name: environment_model_based_triage_tool_begins_lumen_rig_utl
premise: Downwind monitors tripped near a chemical corridor; plant managers claim instrument fault while residents report symptoms. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment model based triage tool begins lumen rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mira Okoye
agents.identity: I am Mira Okoye, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Bennett
agents.identity: I am Mateo Bennett, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so utility does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so rights does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mira Okoye must choose under rights versus utility. What does Mira Okoye do?
